content_body:
We had a wonderful weekend at Crooked Creek. The boys were able to drive from Berry College and Georgia Tech to help celebrate our daughter’s 18th birthday. This was our first time to visit Blue Ridge. We hiked, fished, dined, and relaxed. The swinging bridge was a delight for us all.

We plan to return, and we hope to come back to Crooked Creek. The cabin is perfect, and we love being close to the water.
title: "The Cabin is Perfect"
